CustomField.description: If a Constituent is referenced, pulls the information from the Constituent record. If a Constituent is not referenced, display what was entered in the text field.
CustomField.formula:
IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__c )), NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__r.Email ))),
(Constituent__r.Email &BR() &
"Email Type - " & CASE(Constituent__r.ucinn_ascendv2__Preferred_Email_Type__c,
'U','Business Email', 'O','Other Email', 'M','Personal Email', 'Fundraiser','Fundraiser', 'CC','Corporate Contact Email', 'Other')),
IF(AND(NOT(ISBLANK( Constituent__c )),(ISBLANK( Constituent__r.Email ))),
"No Preferred Email",
IF(ISBLANK(Constituent__c ),
(Email__c &BR() & "Email Type - "& TEXT(Email_Type__c)),
"" )))
CustomField.label: Email and Type
